direction: cache owner-cell ZBC value across CalculateFlux nonboundary branches
rationale: After the special-boundary, dry, and ZI<=BC exits, CalculateFluxKernel repeatedly reloads cells.ZBC[pos] while evaluating the remaining nonboundary flux branches and internal-edge reconstruction. Loading that owner-cell bed value once into ZBCP removes redundant global reads on those paths while preserving the same branch order and flux arithmetic operands.
